docs.title: FinFlow Sankey
docs.text: Polars-first financial statement Sankey visualization library.

docs.title: What is FinFlow Sankey?
docs.text:
FinFlow Sankey converts financial statement data into accounting-validated Sankey diagrams.

Revenue → Cost of Revenue / Gross Profit → Operating Expenses / Operating Income → Tax / Net Income

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Polars-first: Native pl.DataFrame and pl.LazyFrame support.
  • Accounting validation: Detects period/currency mismatches and reconciliation errors before rendering.
  • Role-based colors: Revenue, costs, profit, cash flows each have distinct colors.
  • Customizable themes: Built-in themes plus YAML/dict palette overrides.
  • Multiple statements: Income statement, cash flow statement, balance sheet reconciliation, and multi-period comparison.
  • Plotly output: Returns plotly.graph_objects.Figure for Jupyter, Streamlit, Dash, or HTML export.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: pip install finflow-sankey

docs.title: Quick Example
docs.text:
import polars as pl
from finflow_sankey import FinancialSankey

df = pl.DataFrame({
    "account": ["Revenue", "Operating Expenses", "Net Income"],
    "value": [100.0, -40.0, 60.0],
    "period": ["FY2025"] * 3,
    "currency": ["USD"] * 3,
    "statement": ["income_statement"] * 3,
    "section": ["revenue", "expense", "profit"],
})

fig = FinancialSankey.income_statement(df).validate().render()
fig.show()

docs.title: FinancialSankey
docs.text: Main entry point.

docs.title: income_statement(data, *, period=None, currency=None, mapping=None)
docs.text: Create an income statement Sankey pipeline.

docs.title: cash_flow_statement(data, *, period=None, currency=None, mapping=None)
docs.text: Create a cash flow statement Sankey pipeline.

docs.title: balance_sheet_reconciliation(data, *, as_of=None, currency=None, mapping=None)
docs.text: Create a balance sheet reconciliation Sankey pipeline.

docs.title: multi_period_compare(data, *, currency=None, mapping=None)
docs.text: Create a multi-period comparison Sankey pipeline. Requires exactly two distinct periods in the data.

docs.title: .validate(tolerance=0.01)
docs.text: Validate the input data.

docs.title: .group_minor(min_pct=None, min_value=None, top_n=None, label="Other")
docs.text: Group minor accounts into an "Other" bucket.

docs.title: .render(title=None, renderer="plotly", palette=None, theme=None)
docs.text: Render the Sankey diagram and return a Plotly Figure.

docs.title: .export_html(path, title=None, ...)
docs.text: Render and save the diagram to an HTML file.

docs.title: Changelog
docs.text: {!CHANGELOG.md!}

docs.title: Income Statement
docs.text:
import polars as pl
from finflow_sankey import FinancialSankey

df = pl.DataFrame({
    "account": ["Revenue", "Cost of Revenue", "Operating Expenses", "Tax", "Net Income"],
    "value": [100.0, -40.0, -30.0, -10.0, 20.0],
    "period": ["FY2025"] * 5,
    "currency": ["USD"] * 5,
    "statement": ["income_statement"] * 5,
    "section": ["revenue", "cost_of_revenue", "operating_expenses", "tax", "profit"],
})

fig = (
    FinancialSankey
    .income_statement(df, period="FY2025", currency="USD")
    .validate()
    .render(title="FY2025 Income Statement")
)
fig.show()

docs.title: Cash Flow Statement
docs.text:
fig = (
    FinancialSankey
    .cash_flow_statement(df, period="FY2025", currency="USD")
    .validate()
    .render(title="FY2025 Cash Flow Bridge")
)

docs.title: Balance Sheet Reconciliation
docs.text:
fig = (
    FinancialSankey
    .balance_sheet_reconciliation(df, as_of="2025-12-31", currency="USD")
    .validate()
    .render(title="Balance Sheet")
)

docs.title: Export HTML
docs.text: FinancialSankey.income_statement(df).validate().export_html("output.html")

docs.title: Built-in Themes
docs.text:
• default
  • monochrome
  • colorblind_safe
  • minimal
  • dark
fig = FinancialSankey.income_statement(df).validate().render(theme="dark")

docs.title: Custom Palette via YAML
docs.text:
name: "my_theme"
roles:
  revenue: "#0055FF"
  operating_expenses: "#CC0000"
  profit: "#00AA55"
semantic:
  background: "#FFFFFF"
  link_opacity: 0.45

fig = FinancialSankey.income_statement(df).validate().render(palette="my_theme.yaml")

docs.title: Runtime Dict Override
docs.text:
fig = FinancialSankey.income_statement(df).validate().render(
    palette={"revenue": "#FF0000", "profit": "#00FF00"}
)

docs.title: Validation
docs.text: FinFlow Sankey validates financial data before rendering.

docs.title: Checks
docs.text: Check Error Required columns missing SchemaError Multiple periods PeriodMismatchError Multiple currencies CurrencyMismatchError Duplicate accounts DuplicateAccountError Null values NullValueError Missing required accounts MissingAccountError Income statement reconciliation ReconciliationError Cash flow reconciliation ReconciliationError Balance sheet equation ReconciliationError

docs.title: Error Messages
docs.text: Errors include structured fields such as expected, actual, difference, period, and currency.
